tools.name: osop.validate
tools.description: Validate an OSOP workflow definition against the schema. Returns a list of errors and warnings with line numbers.

content.description: The OSOP YAML content to validate.

file_path.description: Path to an .osop.yaml file to validate. Use either content or file_path.

strict.description: When true, treat warnings as errors.

tools.name: osop.run
tools.description: Execute an OSOP workflow with the given inputs. Returns execution results including node outputs and final state.

content.description: The OSOP YAML content to execute.

file_path.description: Path to an .osop.yaml file to execute.

dry_run.description: When true, simulate execution without side effects.

tools.name: osop.render
tools.description: Render an OSOP workflow as a visual diagram. Supports Mermaid, ASCII, and SVG output formats.

content.description: The OSOP YAML content to render.

file_path.description: Path to an .osop.yaml file to render.

tools.name: osop.test
tools.description: Run test cases defined within an OSOP workflow. Returns pass/fail results for each test case with details.

content.description: The OSOP YAML content containing test cases.

file_path.description: Path to an .osop.yaml file containing test cases.

filter.description: Run only test cases matching this pattern.

verbose.description: Include detailed output for each test step.

tools.name: osop.optimize
tools.description: Analyze an OSOP workflow and suggest optimizations: parallelization, redundancy removal, bottleneck identification, and simplification.

content.description: The OSOP YAML content to analyze.

file_path.description: Path to an .osop.yaml file to analyze.

apply.description: When true, return the optimized OSOP YAML. When false, return suggestions only.

tools.name: osop.import
tools.description: Convert an external workflow format into OSOP. Supported: CrewAI, n8n, GitHub Actions, Airflow, Argo Workflows, LangGraph.

file_path.description: Path to the source file to convert.

source_format.description: The format of the source content.

tools.name: osop.export
tools.description: Convert an OSOP workflow to an external format. Supported: CrewAI, n8n, Argo Workflows.

content.description: The OSOP YAML content to export.

file_path.description: Path to an .osop.yaml file to export.

target_format.description: The target format to convert to.

tools.name: osop.report
tools.description: Generate a report from OSOP workflow + optional execution log. Returns self-contained HTML or plain text.

log_content.description: OSOPLOG YAML content (optional, enables execution mode)

tools.name: osop.convert
tools.description: Convert between OSOP and external workflow formats. Supports CrewAI, n8n, GitHub Actions, Airflow, Argo Workflows, and LangGraph.

tools.name: osop.diff
tools.description: Compare two OSOP workflows structurally. Returns added/removed/changed nodes, edges, and metadata.

tools.name: osop.notion
tools.description: Convert an OSOP workflow into Notion database-ready structures. Returns database schema and page payloads for the Notion API.

tools.name: osop.risk_assess
tools.description: Analyze an OSOP workflow for security risks, permission gaps, unguarded destructive paths, missing approval gates, cost exposure, and segregation of duties violations. Returns a risk score (0-100), verdict (safe/caution/warning/danger), and actionable findings.

content.description: The OSOP YAML content to assess.

file_path.description: Path to an .osop.yaml file to assess.
